name: @galerina/hardware-tier
description: Galerina Tri-Pipe topology: the cached, attested hardware() capability directive {binary|hybrid|photonic} + the per-tier package loader (photonic > hybrid > binary, fail-closed to binary). Capability preference picks the package; the 0053 per-kernel router still gates actual offload — worst case == binary == today.
note: R&D 0054 GAP (spec landed), hub production build. Realizes the hardware() directive + tier loader from tri-pipe-per-tier-packages-and-hardware-directive-spec.md. Neutral: verifyAttestation result is INJECTED (it lives in the Tower, on the BRIDGE surface); the tier MAP mirrors HARDWARE_TRUST_PROFILES (type-registry.ts:455-505). Composes 0053 route() (@galerina/ext-photonic-emulator) for AXIS-2 orthogonality. Contract + photonic imported by relative dist path (repo convention; offline).
